commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `openclaw agents list` provider metadata/output to keep configured missing official external channels and render install/doctor repair hints, with focused provider tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +99. Total +151 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main loses missing official external channel metadata when no plugin object loads, then renders a bound provider as `unknown` or omits the default summary provider line. I did not run the live CLI in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait for contributor-provided real CLI proof; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair task because the patch has no actionable code finding.

target.title: fix agents-providers-missing-external
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`openclaw agents list` builds its `Routing` and `Providers` summaries from read-only provider metadata and account status.

When a configured official external channel was missing its owning plugin, that provider metadata disappeared entirely unless a live plugin object could be loaded. In practice, agent provider summaries could degrade to `unknown` or omit useful repair guidance even though the config still clearly declared the channel.

This patch keeps configured missing official external channels in provider metadata and upgrades agent provider summaries to emit a concrete missing-plugin repair hint instead of a bare `unknown`.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.providers.test.ts`
  - `Test Files  1 passed (1)`
  - `Tests  6 passed (6)`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.commands.list.test.ts`
  - `Test Files  1 passed (1)`
  - `Tests  3 passed (3)`

## Real behavior proof

- `Behavior addressed:`
  `openclaw agents list` no longer degrades configured missing official external channels to an unhelpful `unknown` provider entry; it now reports that the plugin is missing and includes the repair command.

- `Real environment tested:`
  Local targeted Vitest coverage in this checkout.

- `Exact steps or command run after this patch:`
  `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.providers.test.ts`
  `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agents.commands.list.test.ts`

- `Evidence after fix:`
  The new provider-summary regression expects:
  `Feishu default: missing plugin - Install the official external plugin with: openclaw plugins install @openclaw/feishu, or run: openclaw doctor --fix.`

- `Observed result after fix:`
  Both targeted test files passed.

- `What was not tested:`
  Full live `openclaw agents list` CLI output against a real missing-plugin external channel configuration.
target.author: hugenshen
